entries.speaker: marrek
lines:
Interesting times. I find interesting times are good
for business. People need things they didn't know they needed.

entries.speaker: marrek
lines:
I've been on this road longer than most people have
been alive. The road doesn't change. People do.

entries.speaker: marrek
lines:
Business is steady. Isn't that strange? The world is
ending and people still need rope, and candles, and salt. I have
all three.

entries.speaker: marrek
lines:
You're wondering how I'm still here. Still stocked.
I wonder that too, some nights. The road doesn't care about the
grey. It just keeps going. So do I.

entries.speaker: marrek
lines: To the road. And to everyone who walked it.
